title_en: What Knowledge Is of Most Worth

units.orig: CHAPTER I. WHAT KNOWLEDGE IS OF MOST WORTH.
units.zh: 第一章　什麼知識最有價值

units.orig: Thus to the question with which we set out--What knowledge is of most worth?--the uniform reply is--Science. This is the verdict on all the counts.
units.zh: 因此，對於我們出發時所提的問題——什麼知識最有價值？——一致的回答是：科學Science。這是就一切考量所下的裁決。

units.orig: Could a man be secure / That his days would endure / As of old, for a thousand long years, / What things might he know! / What deeds might he do!
units.zh: 若一個人能確信 / 他的歲月將綿延 / 一如往昔，長達千年， / 他能知曉多少事！ / 他能成就多少業！

units.orig: For direct self-preservation, or the maintenance of life and health, the all-important knowledge is--Science. For that indirect self-preservation which we call gaining a livelihood, the knowledge of greatest value is--Science.
units.zh: 對於直接的自我保全，也就是生命與健康的維持，最重要的知識是：科學。對於我們稱為謀生的間接自我保全，價值最大的知識是：科學。

units.orig: * This is the plea put in by some for the rough treatment experienced by boys at our public schools; and it must be admitted that the plea has some force.
units.zh: * 這是有些人替男孩在公學所受粗暴待遇提出的辯解；必須承認，這種辯解有幾分道理。

units.orig: Fig. 1. — Comparative table of educational activities.
units.zh: 圖 1：各類教育活動比較表。

units.orig: And for the purposes of discipline--intellectual, moral, religious--the most efficient study is, once more--Science.
units.zh: 而為了訓練的目的——智育、德育、宗教——最有效的學習，仍然是：科學。
